result:
Everything works. Here's a summary of what was implemented:

## Simulation Sonification Layer

### New file: `life/modes/sonification.py`
A horizontal feature (like the Time-Travel Scrubber) that maps any running simulation's visual state to real-time procedural audio.

**Frame metrics extracted:**
- **Density** — cell population / total cells
- **Activity** — velocity-based for particles, density-derived for grids
- **Spatial entropy** — row distribution uniformity (normalized Shannon entropy)
- **Center of mass** (X, Y) — normalized position of alive cells
- **Horizontal symmetry** — left-right mirror match score

**Audio parameter mapping:**
- **Pitch** — follows vertical center of mass (higher when action is near top)
- **Number of voices** — driven by entropy + density (more complex = richer harmonics)
- **Waveform mix** — sine/sawtooth/pulse weighted per category profile
- **Stereo panning** — follows horizontal center of mass
- **Tempo** — category-specific multiplier on simulation speed
- **Drone layer** — sustained low tone for ambient categories (fluids, fractals)
- **Master volume** — scales with density

**12 category-specific audio profiles:**
| Category | Character |
|---|---|
| Fluid Dynamics | Flowing drones (low base, in-sen scale, heavy drone) |
| Particle & Swarm | Percussive clicks (pulse wave, fast tempo) |
| Fractals & Chaos | Evolving harmonics (mixed waveforms, whole-tone-ish) |
| Physics & Waves | Major scale, moderate drone |
| Chemical & Biological | Harmonic minor, organic feel |
| Classic CA | Clean pentatonic sine tones |
| etc. | Each tuned to match the simulation's character |

### Modified files:
- **`life/modes/__init__.py`** — registered the sonification module
- **`life/app.py`** — 5 integration points:
  - Added `threading` import
  - Instance state init (`sonify_enabled`, `_sonify_thread`, `_sonify_stop`)
  - `_sonify_frame()` called each main-loop iteration (after `_tt_auto_record`)
  - Sonification indicator overlay drawn after time-travel scrubber
  - `Ctrl+S` toggle key (key code 19)
  - Status bar shows `♫ SONIFY` when active
